response: convert the initial art collection tax is calculated as two million dollars times twenty percent less five percent discount resulting in three hundred eighty thousand dollars. convert the original real estate tax is computed by applying ten percent to one million, fifteen percent to two million, and twenty percent to one million totaling five hundred thousand dollars. convert the securities portfolio tax is determined by subtracting one hundred thousand from three million and applying fifteen percent to yield four hundred thirty five thousand dollars. convert the total initial tax liability sums these three amounts to equal one million three hundred fifteen thousand dollars. convert the real estate valuation error increases the value by ten percent to five point five million dollars requiring a new tax calculation. convert the new real estate tax applies ten percent to one million, fifteen percent to two million, and twenty percent to two point five million totaling seven hundred fifty thousand dollars. convert the adjusted total tax liability combines the unchanged art and securities taxes with the new real estate tax to equal one million six hundred fifteen thousand dollars.
